title: Manufacturing Engineer - Netafim India Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Netafim India Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India Global Group:
Netafim India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India Global Group!
